ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the network device */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the network device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the network device */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Software version running on the device */,
  "pop_location" TEXT /* Physical location of the Point of Presence (POP) */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider of the device */,
  "management_ip" TEXT /* Management IP address of the device */,
  "snmp_version" TEXT /* SNMP version used for device monitoring */,
  "syslog_server" TEXT /* Syslog server IP address for logging */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_devices_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_devices_pop_location FOREIGN KEY ("pop_location") REFERENCES pop_locations ("pop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  "support_contact" TEXT /* Support contact email or phone number */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pop_locations" (
  "pop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each POP location */,
  "pop_name" TEXT /* Name of the POP location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the POP */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the POP */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the POP */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the POP */,
  "physical_security" TEXT /* Physical security measures in place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* Configuration data for the device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., initial, updated) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric being monitored */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the monitoring event */,
  "monitoring_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the device is monitored */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the monitored metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_monitoring_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic flow */,
  "source_device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source network device */,
  "destination_device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination network device */,
  "traffic_volume" REAL /* Volume of traffic in the flow */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the traffic flow */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the traffic flow */,
  "traffic_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the traffic flow */,
  "dscp_value" INTEGER /* DSCP value for QoS */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_flows_source_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_flows_destination_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of security check performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_standard" TEXT /* Compliance standard being checked */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_compliance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, administrator) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., configuration update, monitoring) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fault_reports" (
  "fault_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fault report */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device */,
  "reported_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reported the fault */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fault */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the fault report */,
  "fault_category" TEXT /* Category of the fault */,
  "root_cause" TEXT /* Root cause of the fault */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fault_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_reports_reported_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fault_reports_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device */,
  "performed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the maintenance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the maintenance task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the metric measurement */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_redundancy" (
  "redundancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redundancy configuration */,
  "primary_device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary network device */,
  "secondary_device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the secondary network device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the redundancy configuration */,
  "redundancy_type" TEXT /* Type of redundancy configuration */,
  "failover_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes for failover to occur */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redundancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_redundancy_primary_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_redundancy_secondary_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("secondary_device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_routing_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic routing policy */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the network device */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address for the policy */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address for the policy */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action to take for the traffic */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the policy */,
  "policy_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the policy */,
  "policy_tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or labels for the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_routing_policies_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)
